ddls:
CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the color */,
  "rgb_value" TEXT /* RGB value of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "year_prominent" INTEGER /* Year when the color was prominent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the color was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the color's information */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the color */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the color */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the color is currently active */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the color (e.g., Pantone, RAL, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_year_prominent FOREIGN KEY ("year_prominent") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year when the color was prominent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color palette */,
  "palette_name" TEXT /* Name of the color palette */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color palette */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the palette */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the palette was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the palette */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the palette */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the palette is public or private */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the palette to support version control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "palette_colors" (
  "palette_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color in a palette */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "order_in_palette" INTEGER /* Order in which the color appears in the palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the color was added to the palette */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the color to the palette */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_colors_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planning, in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_palettes" (
  "project_palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a project and a palette */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_palettes_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_palettes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, marketer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., design, marketing) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette (if the comment is on a palette) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project (if the comment is on a project) */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is public or private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette (if the color is used in a palette) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project (if the color is used in a project) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the color was used */,
  "context" TEXT /* Description of the context in which the color was used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_usage_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)
